about: Acceptance criteria for the PURE rule engine (Block 1). Codex must make evaluate(signals, registry) reproduce every expected output exactly. No model involved.

scoring_rules.coverage: element-scored artifact (has elements): coverage = elementsPresent.length / elements.length. Otherwise coverage = 1.0 if present with a source, else 0.
scoring_rules.points_per_artifact: weight * coverage, ONLY when status is found or verified. not_located contributes 0.
scoring_rules.no_source_rule: a signal with present=true but hasSource=false is DOWNGRADED to status not_located and contributes 0. Never a `found` without a source.
scoring_rules.status: found = present && hasSource. not_located = otherwise. verified is set only by human step (not by this engine).
scoring_rules.unseen: list of artifactIds whose status is not_located (includes artifacts absent from the signal list).
scoring_rules.rounding: score.points and byDimension rounded to 1 decimal place, half up.

fixtures.name: sb_partial_realistic
fixtures.description: GenAI policy fully present, strategic + tech plans present, everything else not located.

fixtures.name: genai_partial_elements
fixtures.description: GenAI policy present but only 3 of 6 required elements. Nothing else.

fixtures.name: no_source_downgrade
fixtures.description: GenAI policy claimed present but with NO source. Must downgrade to not_located and score 0. This guards the whole trust model.

fixtures.name: empty_scan
fixtures.description: No signals at all. Everything not located, score 0. The tool asserts nothing.
